author: michaelhems
title: Very great!
content: This app is trustable and does what it is supposed to, you just have to learn how to use it and then add id3 tags! This is a really good app and if you are interested in id3 tags download this!

author: úle aka the owl
title: Good
content: Generally very good, saves time editing album covers for example. Only gripe is that for whatever reason on certain files I cannot remove all the metadata, eg song number, year and comments. i go to save it then this stuff just reappears instantly. Frustrating but otherwise this would easily be a five star.

author: kanyelover88373
title: Best thing ever
content: Let me add unreleased Kanye songs to my playlist thank you so much I can listen to bittersweet poetry and mamas boyfriend!!!

author: jbp🍑
title: Flip a coin
content: Sometimes it works, sometimes it doesn't. With particular reference to batch mode, I got it to work once only… You would have thought that a app that has been around for this long would be working by now…

author: Eltottotto
title: Doesn’t work
content: Used to use this all the time but for some reason every time I try to save changes it says “failed to save audio tags” and it’s happened since the update and it’s so much slower now

author: reiisxq
title: perfect
content: been using for years and let me tell yall it eats as a comparison to documents! let’s u add cover art to ur music which u cant do on documents aswell as change metadata which is useful this app has been the loml ever since i got my first iphone around 4 years ago!

author: That Nickname is Taken!.
title: It’s refusing to work
content: Works on everything but a certain selection of files

author: A Piece Of Keiko
title: It's like flipping a coin
content: Sometimes it works, sometimes the files don't play once exported......brilliant when it works, enraging when it doesn't.

author: WWhaat!
title: Where’s my file??
content: Since the latest update it seems like a game of hide and seek to find edited files…..there’s got to be better alternatives out there. As soon as I find one this app is gone from my phone forever!

author: Bren611965
title: Why are are you trying to get more money out of me when I have already paid for premium?
content: Why are are you trying to get more money out of me when I have already paid for premium?

author: Lola 💚🫶🏽
title: great app but issues
content: good and useful app! i could customise the name and cover art for a couple songs but then if stopped working completely

author: zola20zola
title: Does not work
content: This app does not access your music library so is useless for the majority of users, who does not keep their music in the music library?

author: Heyskibidimaster
title: Just like my dad
content: The files don’t appear for me..I extracted the files and put it onto the app and it doesn’t show up

author: Narcsy
title: Works Perfect
content: finally a good mp3 tagger compatible on phone

author: Neo 1 the one
title: Re number tracks
content: Great app but would be better if we could renumber all tracks in the album

author: Sangunvi
title: Does what it’s supposed to
content: Easy to use, and does what it’s meant to do with no issues. Good job!
